_comment: Saturn session state — updated by the agent at start and end of each 4-hour session.

event_queue.event: Q1 FY2027 earnings on 2026-05-27 (4 days out). Consensus $2.40B revenue / $0.79 EPS; options pricing 13% move. MRVL at ATH ~$192. Stifel expects beat-and-raise: optical interconnects 50% YoY FY2027, Trainium 3 in production, XPU-Attach broadening. Post-earnings: re-run DCF and revise story_narrative. Current MoS -37.5% requires meaningful revision to reach HOLD.
price +4.11% on 2026-05-23 ($751). Melius raised PT to $1,100. 1α DRAM chips launched in Virginia. Samsung union vote result due by May 27 — monitor for HBM supply impact.

_event_queue_note: Session 11: MRVL pre-earnings deep session. Stifel $210 PT — optical 50% YoY FY2027, Trainium 3 in production. MU +4.11% added to event_queue. No DCF run (MRVL DCF ran May 22 — waiting for May 27 earnings). Phase 1b/1c gated (11%3=2, 11%6=5). Next: MRVL earnings on May 27 — post-earnings DCF re-run is the priority action.
